category_sources: Official README describes Carthage as a way to add frameworks to Cocoa applications
source_facts.description says Carthage is a decentralized dependency manager for Cocoa
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository and README use the name Carthage
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains Quick Start and usage documentation
Official repository includes a Documentation directory
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/Carthage/Carthage; per instruction, repo was not re-evaluated
tags_sources: Official README discusses Cocoa applications, Xcode projects, frameworks, and platform-specific builds
